raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Litigation financing has become a multibillion-dollar global industry.",
    "Lenders make an average 68% profit on loans in litigation financing.",
    "Abusive funding practices in litigation financing should be disclosed.",
    "Lawsuit lending disproportionately hurts vulnerable individuals who are unbanked, underbanked, and without a financial safety net.",
```
